title: Hello Detectives
overview: Something strange has been happening to John Watson. He goes to the detectives in Kabukicho for help, but they're even weirder!

title: Why Not Join the Staring-At-Eye-Moles Squad?
overview: A woman is hired as an idol for her beautiful moles under her eyes. But when the day of her big show comes, the producer disappears! Is a crime involved?

title: The Dream of Fuyuto Kyokgoku, the Ace
overview: A nephew is framed for the murder of his uncle, and it's up to Sherlock to clear his name.

title: The Water's Usually Hot
overview: Now that he's broke, Watson has to use the public bath. But there's murder waiting for him there, too!

title: Offside is the Best Side
overview: Mary's decided she wants to go to an expensive school, and Lucy decides to raise the money. But getting big money fast means taking big risks...

title: Kobayashi the Man, Giving It His All
overview: Kobayashi runs into his old boss from his time in the Kaneko Gang. When one of the Kabukicho Irregulars steals a valuable sticker from the gangster, he'll have to risk it all to help them out.

title: Wife Looks Into the Future
overview: Watson gets his first solo case as Sherlock sends him to investigate the home of the mysterious Irene Adler.

title: Don't Take Off the Swimsuit
overview: Irene joins the team as they track down a medical chart in the possession of an infamous blackmailer, while Sherlock gets stuck with childcare duties.

title: That Woman's Pad
overview: Jack the Ripper is after Irene's life, and Sherlock and Watson must take extraordinary steps to protect her.

title: Now Hiring Psychics
overview: A badly depressed Watson struggles to come to terms with his new life, as Sherlock vows vengeance on Jack the Ripper.

title: Jack the Ripper
overview: The identity of Jack the Ripper is revealed when Sherlock finally makes his move.

title: No More Nyan-Nyan
overview: The detectives try to cheer up after a hard week. Mrs. Hudson sends them after her missing cat to keep their minds occupied.

title: First Moonlit Night
overview: While James has a difficult time in prison, Mycroft arrives at the row house and reflects on how Sherlock got his start in rakugo.

title: Take Back Your Melon Heart
overview: Fuyuto is in shock and not himself for several weeks after the events with Jack the Ripper. Sent to the hospital, he is met with a new case.

title: Where Is He?
overview: Watson and Mary do their best to stop the scammers that are planning a horrific upcoming terrorist attack.

title: Michel and Dopey
overview: Michel finally reunites with his long-lost daughter, but she is promptly arrested for murder soon after.

title: Looking Back on Saudade
overview: Ten months after the business with Michel's daughter, Sherlock cracks a mysterious code that leads to an even deeper mystery.

title: Lots of Animals
overview: What starts off as an investigation into an animal killer, escalates into something far more sinister and dangerous.

title: The Curtain Rises on the Grand Guignol
overview: New information comes to light about all of the strange incidents, and the true cause of everything is finally revealed.

title: Moriarty Savors
overview: As the villain makes his move, Watson finds himself in serious danger; Mary is caught in a compromising position.

title: Not Breathing
overview: With Watson's disappearance accomplished, the villain is prepared to execute the next phase of his master plan.

title: The Thread Where We Talk About Yeast
overview: A Santa with a purple beard drops off some presents and a suspicious Sherlock chases after him before receivnig an invitation to a clandestine meeting.

title: Everybody Be There at Eight
overview: Watson desperately tries to find Sherlock before he reaches the point of no return. He even tries to hire the other detectives, but they refuse to help.

title: See You in Kabukicho!
overview: Following the investigation into Moriarty, Sherlock performs his final rakugo entitled Moriarty the Living.
